info.name: EverCut - Customer Bookings
info.description: Customer booking management - create, view, cancel, reschedule bookings

request.description:
Get customer bookings filtered by type.

Query Parameters:
- type: upcoming (future bookings), past (completed/cancelled), favorites

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "_id": "...",
      "shopId": {...},
      "employeeId": {...},
      "serviceIds": [...],
      "date": "2024-03-15",
      "time": "14:30",
      "totalAmount": 500,
      "status": "confirmed"
    }
  ]
}

Create a new booking.

Required Fields:
- serviceId: array of service IDs
- employeeId: employee ID
- shopId: shop ID
- date: YYYY-MM-DD (must be future date)
- time: HH:MM (must be within shop hours)
- amount: total amount (optional, auto-calculated)

Business Rules:
- Cannot book in the past
- Must be within shop hours
- Employee must be available
- Shop must be open

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking created successfully",
  "data": {
    "bookingId": "...",
    "shopId": "...",
    "employee": {...},
    "services": [...],
    "date": "2024-03-15",
    "time": "14:30",
    "totalAmount": 500,
    "status": "confirmed"
  }
}

Get detailed information about a specific booking.

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "bookingId": "...",
    "customer": {...},
    "employee": {...},
    "shop": {...},
    "services": [...],
    "date": "2024-03-15",
    "time": "14:30",
    "totalAmount": 500,
    "totalServices": 2,
    "status": "confirmed",
    "paymentStatus": "pending"
  }
}

Cancel a booking.

Business Rules:
- Cannot cancel if already completed
- Cannot cancel if already cancelled
- Cannot cancel past appointments
- Must cancel at least 2 hours before appointment

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking cancelled",
  "data": {...}
}

Reschedule a booking to a new date/time.

Required Fields:
- newDate: YYYY-MM-DD
- newTime: HH:MM

Business Rules:
- Maximum 1 reschedule per booking
- Cannot reschedule past appointments
- Must reschedule at least 2 hours before appointment
- New slot must be available

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking rescheduled",
  "data": {...}
}

Rebook the same services with a new date/time (creates a new booking).

Required Fields:
- newDate: YYYY-MM-DD
- newTime: HH:MM

Difference from Reschedule:
- Creates a NEW booking (original remains unchanged)
- No limit on how many times you can reorder
- Useful for repeat customers

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking reordered",
  "data": {
    "bookingId": "new_booking_id",
    "employee": {...},
    "services": [...],
    "totalAmount": 500
  }
}

Update booking details (employee, date, time).

Optional Fields:
- employeeId
- date
- time

Response:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking updated",
  "data": {...}
}
